          +[  Outer  ]-------------------+
          |   +[  Inner  ]-----------+   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |   +[  Deep  ]----+   |   |
          |   |   |              |   |   |
          |   |   |              |   |   |
+------+  |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |        +-------+
|  In  +--o---o---o->|  Node  +--o---o---o------->|  Out  |
+------+  |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |        +-------+
          |   |   |              |   |   |
          |   |   |              |   |   |
          |   |   +--------------+   |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   |                      |   |
          |   +----------------------+   |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          |                              |
          +------------------------------+
